Package neqsim.process.research

Class ProcessCandidateEvaluator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.research.ProcessCandidateEvaluator
public class ProcessCandidateEvaluator extends Object
Evaluates and scores generated process candidates.

The evaluator builds each candidate through ProcessSystem.fromJsonAndRun(String), applies optional decision-variable grid screening through ProcessSimulationEvaluator, and ranks candidates by weighted product flow, purity, and constraint penalties.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • ProcessCandidateEvaluator

      public ProcessCandidateEvaluator()
      Creates a process candidate evaluator.

  • Method Details

    • evaluate

      public void evaluate(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
      Evaluates a candidate and updates it in place.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to evaluate
      spec - process research specification

    • optimizeWithGrid

      private void optimizeWithGrid(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessSystem process, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
      Runs a bounded grid search for the candidate decision variables.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate being optimized
      process - built process system
      spec - process research specification

    • addBestPointObjectives

      private void addBestPointObjectives(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, double[] bestPoint)
      Adds best-point decision variable values to candidate objectives.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to update
      spec - process research specification
      bestPoint - best decision variable vector

    • buildGrid

      private List<double[]> buildGrid(List<ProcessResearchSpec.DecisionVariable> variables, int maxCases)
      Builds a Cartesian grid for decision-variable screening.
      Parameters:
      variables - decision variables
      maxCases - maximum number of cases
      Returns:
      list of grid points

    • buildGridRecursive

      private void buildGridRecursive(List<ProcessResearchSpec.DecisionVariable> variables, int index, double[] current, List<double[]> points, int maxCases)
      Recursively builds grid points.
      Parameters:
      variables - decision variables
      index - current variable index
      current - current point under construction
      points - accumulated points
      maxCases - maximum number of points

    • scoreProcess

      private double scoreProcess(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, boolean recordMetrics)
      Scores a process against the product targets.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to score
      candidate - candidate metadata with product stream references
      spec - process research specification
      recordMetrics - whether to record detailed metrics and warnings on the candidate
      Returns:
      ranking score; higher is better

    • recordMetrics

      private void recordMetrics(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics)
      Records structured metrics on a candidate.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to update
      metrics - metrics to record

    • collectProcessMetrics

      private ProcessResearchMetrics collectProcessMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, boolean recordWarnings)
      Collects process-wide energy, heat-integration, cost, emissions, and complexity metrics.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      candidate - candidate receiving warnings when requested
      spec - process research specification
      recordWarnings - true to record warning messages on the candidate
      Returns:
      process metrics

    • addHeatIntegrationMetrics

      private void addHeatIntegrationMetrics(ProcessSystem process, ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, boolean recordWarnings)
      Adds pinch-analysis metrics when requested.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to analyze
      candidate - candidate receiving warnings when requested
      spec - process research specification
      metrics - metrics to update
      recordWarnings - true to record warning messages on the candidate

    • addOperatingCostMetrics

      private void addOperatingCostMetrics(ProcessResearchSpec spec, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics)
      Adds annual operating cost metrics from energy and utility terms.
      Parameters:
      spec - process research specification
      metrics - metrics to update

    • applyProcessPenalties

      private double applyProcessPenalties(double score, ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
      Applies process-level penalties to the product score.
      Parameters:
      score - current product score
      metrics - process metrics
      spec - process research specification
      Returns:
      adjusted score

    • findConstraintViolations

      private List<String> findConstraintViolations(ProcessResearchMetrics metrics, ProcessResearchSpec spec)
      Finds hard synthesis constraint violations.
      Parameters:
      metrics - process metrics
      spec - process research specification
      Returns:
      violation descriptions

    • addViolation

      private void addViolation(List<String> violations, String metricName, double value, double limit)
      Adds a violation when a metric exceeds a finite limit.
      Parameters:
      violations - violation list to update
      metricName - metric name
      value - metric value
      limit - finite maximum limit or infinity

    • isFinite

      private boolean isFinite(double value)
      Checks whether a value is finite.
      Parameters:
      value - value to inspect
      Returns:
      true when value is neither infinite nor NaN

    • evaluateRobustness

      private double evaluateRobustness(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec spec, double baseScore)
      Evaluates optional feed-condition robustness scenarios.
      Parameters:
      candidate - candidate to perturb
      spec - process research specification
      baseScore - base-case score
      Returns:
      worst-case score delta relative to the base case

    • createScenarioJson

      private String createScenarioJson(String jsonDefinition, ProcessResearchSpec.RobustnessScenario scenario)
      Creates a perturbed candidate JSON for a robustness scenario.
      Parameters:
      jsonDefinition - base candidate JSON
      scenario - robustness scenario
      Returns:
      perturbed JSON

    • resolveTargetReference

      private String resolveTargetReference(ProcessCandidate candidate, ProcessResearchSpec.ProductTarget target)
      Resolves the stream reference used for a product target.
      Parameters:
      candidate - process candidate
      target - product target
      Returns:
      stream reference string

    • safeFlowRate

      private double safeFlowRate(StreamInterface stream)
      Safely reads stream flow rate.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to read
      Returns:
      stream flow rate in kg/hr, or zero on failure

    • safePurity

      private double safePurity(StreamInterface stream, String componentName)
      Safely reads product purity as overall mole fraction.
      Parameters:
      stream - stream to inspect
      componentName - component name, or null to skip purity
      Returns:
      purity mole fraction, or NaN when unavailable
